title: stenanthemum notiale subsp. notiale
intro: Stenanthemum notiale subsp. notiale, a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, is native to Western Australia. It is a shrub that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this plant are believed to include relief from colds, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Stenanthemum notiale subsp. notiale can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
